title: Quote of the day by Michael Price: "The goal is to make good returns with less risk. Risk is not the same as volatility. It’s very hard to measure risk."
description: Successful investing prioritizes good returns with minimized risk, distinguishing it from mere volatility. This necessitates a long-term perspective and thoughtful analysis beyond simple numerical measurements.

signal_reason: The statement encourages a deeper analysis of risk versus volatility, which may influence investor behavior towards more stable investments.
